prompt: I need to set up an isolated GPT-OSS-20B endpoint on Nebius in eu-west1 that auto-scales between 2 and 5 replicas. Walk me through the API calls to create it, wait for it to be ready, and run a test inference.

assertions.text: Includes region: eu-west1 in the payload
Sets scaling with min_replicas=2 and max_replicas=5
Polls for status == 'ready' before running inference
Uses eu-west1 inference base URL for actual inference calls
Uses routing_key for inference model parameter
